text:
Athens Times

—

The 2024 Olympic Games were closed with Tom Cruise carrying the Olympic flag as in a film in , but now the real tradition for . After Paris, the Olympic Games were transferred to Los Angeles for 2028 and the Olympic flag arrived on a special plane that brought the Olympic Games logo 2028. Diving champion Delaney Schnell and Los Angeles mayor Karen Bass took the flag off the plane at a special event planned for her arrival in the U.S. State. Los Angeles has already begun preparing for the 2028 Olympics.

Athens Times

News about Greece and the World.
title: Olympic Games 2028: The Olympic flag has officially arrived in the US - Athens Times
